sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Federal Realty (NYSE: FRT) shows 0 shares
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership of Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) common stock as of March 13, 2026. This change is attributed to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which disaggregated certain Vanguard subsidiaries for separate reporting in accordance with SEC guidance. The filing clarifies that this is an administrative change in reporting structure and not an economic sale of shares.

feed.title: Experience real-time quotes, in-depth charts, and analyst ratings

It includes real-time quotes, financial data, professional analyst ratings, in-depth charts, and corporate actions. The company, Mega Fortune Co Ltd, is an investment holding company focused on IoT solutions providing services.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings, reports 0% in Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX)

This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which led certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions to report their ownership separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing emphasizes that The Vanguard Group no longer holds beneficial ownership over securities now reported by these disaggregated entities.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Franklin Resources (NYSE: BEN) shows 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Franklin Resources Inc. (NYSE: BEN), reporting zero beneficial ownership due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment disaggregated certain subsidiaries' holdings, meaning these entities will now report their ownership separately according to SEC guidance. The filing clarifies that Vanguard itself no longer holds beneficial ownership of these shares, and investors should look for future filings from Vanguard's associated entities for actual holding information.

feed.title: CarMax ordered to pay $1.1 million, Simi Motorcyclist arrested in chase
feed.summary: CarMax has been ordered to pay $1.1 million in a settlement after being accused of failing to transfer vehicle ownership certificates in a timely manner. Separately, a Simi Valley motorcyclist was arrested on suspicion of felony evading after leading police on a high-speed chase earlier in the month. Ventura County received a portion of the CarMax settlement, and the company has agreed to implement new consumer protection policies.

feed.title: Starbucks (SBUX) CFO has shares withheld to cover RSU tax bill
feed.summary: Starbucks CFO Cathy R. Smith had 2,231.435 shares of Common Stock withheld to cover tax obligations upon the vesting of restricted stock units. This was not an open market sale, but a routine tax-related disposition at a price of $91.98 per share. Following this event, Smith directly holds 63,751.726 Starbucks shares, which includes dividend equivalents on unvested RSUs.

feed.title: Celebrity Cruises is confirmed to visit Royal Caribbean’s new South Pacific private destination – here are the sailings
feed.summary: Celebrity Cruises will begin visiting Royal Caribbean's new private destination at Lelepa in the South Pacific, with two itineraries confirmed for the 2027/28 season. While Royal Caribbean has heavily integrated Lelepa into its Australian itineraries, Celebrity is currently offering a limited number of sailings to the destination, which could expand in future seasons, potentially increasing the presence of ships like Celebrity Solstice in the region. The move highlights a potential strategic differentiation, with Royal Caribbean focusing on the South Pacific and Celebrity offering alternative domestic and occasional South Pacific options.

feed.title: Marvell CEO Murphy sells $2.96 million in shares
feed.summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. CEO and Chairman Matthew J. Murphy sold 30,000 shares of company stock for $2.96 million, with individual transactions ranging from $97.27 to $100.49 per share. This sale occurred under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan established in December 2025, while the stock was trading near its 52-week high and up 47% over the past year. Following the sale, Murphy directly owns 310,106 shares.

feed.title: Studio City International (NYSE:MSC) Operations And Market Activity Driving Global Expansion
feed.summary: Studio City International (NYSE:MSC) operates an integrated resort on the Cotai Strip in Macau, combining gaming with diverse non-gaming attractions like retail, dining, and entertainment. The company has seen a notable decline in short interest and maintains a business model that emphasizes operational diversification to mitigate risk within the competitive Macau market. Analyst ratings currently reflect a cautious stance with a reiterated sell rating.

feed.title: Oracle bets bigger on Nashville with room for 2,000 workers
feed.summary: Oracle has signed a new lease for 116,000 square feet at The Neuhoff District in Nashville, expanding its total office capacity in the city to approximately 2,000 seats across three locations. This move supports planned local hiring and growth for its cloud and AI teams, reinforcing Oracle's long-term commitment to Nashville's tech community. The expansion is part of Oracle's broader strategy to invest in physical infrastructure, talent development, and community engagement in the region.

feed.title: Gartner: LLMs to be up to 100X more cost-efficient by 2030
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that by 2030, large language model (LLM) training costs will decrease by 90% due to advancements in semiconductor technology, model design, and increased chip utilization. However, overall inference costs are expected to rise as demand for tokens grows disproportionately to the decline in token prices, especially with the adoption of agentic-led frontier intelligence. Enterprises are advised not to rely solely on cheap tokens, as advanced reasoning still requires significant computational resources.

feed.title: Madrigal Grants Equity Awards to Seven New Employees
feed.summary: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDGL) has granted equity awards to seven new non-executive employees as inducement awards under its 2025 Inducement Plan. These awards, consisting of 1,739 time-based restricted stock units, will vest in four equal annual installments, contingent on continued employment. The grants were made to attract and incentivize the new hires at the biopharmaceutical company, which focuses on developing treatments for a liver disease called metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] GLOBAL PAYMENTS INC Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amendment No. 12 to Schedule 13G/A for Global Payments Inc., reporting zero beneficial ownership of common stock following an internal realignment. This change means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing emphasizes that The Vanguard Group no longer claims beneficial ownership over these disaggregated securities.

feed.title: Advisor Moves: Shore to Summit brings in two managing directors from Wells Fargo, Raymond James welcomes veteran advisor in Virginia
feed.summary: Shore to Summit Wealth Management has expanded its Bethesda, Maryland office by bringing in Catherine Nicholas and Moshe Burstin as managing directors and partners from Wells Fargo Advisors. Concurrently, Raymond James' Financial Institutions Division welcomed financial advisor Edward “Ed” Vollbrecht to Atlantic Union Financial Consultants in Virginia, where he will manage approximately $163 million in client assets previously held at Truist. These moves signify continued growth and strategic partnerships within the independent wealth management sector.

feed.title: San Antonio-based Valero Energy hit with lawsuit over Port Arthur refinery explosion
feed.summary: Valero Energy is being sued by a worker allegedly injured in a refinery explosion at its Port Arthur facility. The lawsuit, seeking over $1 million in damages, claims the company failed to properly maintain its equipment, leading to injuries including PTSD for the plaintiff. Valero has not commented on the suit but previously stated all employees were accounted for after the blast.

feed.title: Vanguard (EXR) Reports 0 Shares After Internal Realignment, Disaggregated Reporting
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A for Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR), reporting zero shares beneficially owned and 0% ownership. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, which causes certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report their holdings separately. The filing clarifies that this is a reporting change, not a sale or purchase of shares, and does not indicate any corporate action or dilution for EXR shareholders.

feed.title: Autodesk (ADSK) EVP Keene gets 7,751-share award, withholds stock for tax
feed.summary: Autodesk EVP Ruth Ann Keene received a grant of 7,751 shares of common stock at $0.00 per share, tied to performance stock unit attainment on March 24, 2026. On the same date, 7,028 shares valued at $247.44 per share were withheld to cover tax obligations, rather than being sold in the open market. Following these transactions, Keene directly beneficially owns 84,833 shares, which includes 5,459 unvested restricted stock units.

feed.title: Financial Report Live - Cintas Corporation (CTAS.US) Q3 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: This article announces the Cintas Corporation (CTAS.US) Q3 2026 Earnings Conference Call, which was livestreamed on March 25, 2026, at 17:15. It also provides links to previous earnings call livestreams for Q2, Q1, and Q4 2025. The content includes a standard risk and disclaimer statement.

feed.title: Meritage Homes raises executive compensation targets for 2026
feed.summary: Meritage Homes Corporation announced increased compensation targets for several senior executives, effective January 1, 2026, despite the company's stock trading near its 52-week low. The adjustments include higher annual cash incentives and equity compensation, with performance-based equity awards tied to adjusted return on equity and relative total shareholder return. This news follows their Q4 2025 earnings report, where EPS beat expectations but revenue missed, and an initiation of coverage with a "buy" rating from Truist Securities.

feed.title: The J.M. Smucker Co. and JDE Peet's Announce Strategic Liquid Coffee Partnership
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. and JDE Peet's have formed a strategic partnership where JDE Peet's will support Smucker's Away From Home liquid coffee business in product development, production, and foodservice equipment innovation. As a result, J.M. Smucker Co. plans to close and sell its Suffolk, Virginia production facility in spring 2022. This collaboration does not affect Smucker's retail coffee business, which includes brands like Folgers and Café Bustelo.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) stock dropped 1.27% to $291.66 on Thursday, breaking a three-day winning streak. This decline occurred during a broader market downturn, with the S&P 500 Index falling 1.74% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average decreasing by 1.01%.

feed.title: General Motors (GM) Stock Moves -1.32%: What You Should Know
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) closed at $75.60, down -1.32%, outperforming the S&P 500's larger loss. The company is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 28, 2026, with forecasted EPS of $2.64 and revenue of $43.67 billion. GM currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) and is trading at a Forward P/E ratio of 6.25, indicating a discount compared to its industry.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Is Up 33% Year to Date. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has seen its stock rise 33% year-to-date, driven by early signs of stabilization in residential solar markets after a downturn. The company's valuation model suggests a target price of $50, implying a 16% upside over the next 2.8 years, as demand recovers, margins improve, and energy storage adoption increases. Institutional investors are actively positioning themselves, with major firms increasing their stakes, signaling confidence in Enphase's future performance.

feed.title: BSX Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Boston Scientific Corporation Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding purchasers of Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) common stock between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026, of the May 4, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline for a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Boston Scientific made materially false and misleading statements about the unsustainable growth of its U.S. Electrophysiology segment, leading to investor damages. Investors who bought BSX stock during this period may be entitled to compensation and are encouraged to contact the law firm.

feed.title: Newmont files 2025 Annual Report and underscores global investor disclosure
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation, a leading global gold miner with diversified metal outputs, has filed its 2025 Annual Report with the SEC. The company emphasizes its commitment to transparent disclosure for investors across its global exchange listings, including the ASX, NYSE, and PNGX. Newmont, listed in the S&P 500, highlights its strong ESG credentials and aims to create value through sustainable and responsible mining practices.

feed.title: Newmont Files 2026 Proxy Materials Ahead of Annual Stockholders Meeting
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation has filed its 2026 Proxy Statement, Notice of Annual Meeting of Stockholders, and related proxy soliciting materials with the SEC. These documents are now accessible via the company’s website and the EDGAR system, initiating the annual governance and voting process for shareholders. The filing reinforces Newmont's commitment to shareholder engagement and underscores its role as a leading global producer of gold and base metals.

feed.title: Circular Design Illustrated Through Four Cisco Products
feed.summary: Cisco is committed to circular design, integrating sustainability into products and packaging from the outset to extend product life cycles, reduce waste, and improve energy efficiency. The article highlights four product examples—UCS-X servers, Webex Room Bar, Desk Phone 9800 Series, and Nexus 9332D-H2R Switch—each demonstrating specific circular design principles such as modularity, recycled content, efficient power use, and improved repairability. Cisco aims to apply circular design principles to 100% of new products and packaging in FY26, continuously refining its criteria based on stakeholder feedback.
